Item Name: ROASTED PUMPKIN SEEDS to Eat in Shell by Premium Orchards MIXED NUTS - Salted with Sea Salt - Non-GMO Vegan Fresh Healthy Snacks/ - Great source of Plant Protein, Zinc, Magnesium & Iron - 1 Bag
Bullet Point 1: ✅ DRY ROASTED: These are the perfect salty snacks and the best pumpkin seeds for a high protein mix! Dry roasting without oil or added preservatives ensures healthy nutrients and fresh flavors remain intact rather than eliminating nutrients in the seed through frying.
Bullet Point 2: ✅ HIGH PROTEIN SNACKS: Pumpkin seeds roasted and salted make a fantastic keto snack. They are relatively high in protein compared to many other seeds and nuts, with an average of 20-30 grams of protein per 100 grams --a valuable plant-based protein!
Bullet Point 3: ✅ "LADY NAIL" VARIETY: Imported from Bulgaria and packaged in the USA, our lightly salted pumpkin seed is an excellent source of magnesium, iron, and zinc. Each seed also provides calcium, copper, vitamin E, potassium, phosphorus and antioxidants.
Bullet Point 4: ✅ VERSATILE: Lightly salted, roasted pumpkin seeds can be used in various ways. They can be sprinkled over salads, soups, or roasted vegetables for added crunch and flavor.
Bullet Point 5: ✅ QUALITY: Our Premium Orchard products abide by top standards of quality, consistency, and specialty. We are Kosher and HACCP certified. Quality is our top priority. We guarantee freshness and proudly present each healthy snack product.
Product Description: Quality Dry Roasting Our unshelled, bulk pumpkin seeds undergo a dry roasting process that aligns with our goal to provide customers with healthy, quality goods. Dry roasting indicates that the ingredients are not fried but instead roasted without oil or added preservatives. Rather than eliminating essential nutrients by frying the nuts or seeds, dry roasting ensures its healthy nutrients and fresh flavors remain intact. That is what differentiates us from many of our competitors; we prioritize quality over ease. Natural ingredients, such as sea salt, are then used for flavoring. This key process provides our consumers with a wholesome experience that leaves them feeling good. Carefully Sourced Many of our delicious ingredients are locally sourced from California, Oregon, & Texas. Our ingredients are also sourced from top of the line suppliers from countries around the globe, including Bulgaria, Thailand, Argentina, Vietnam, Brazil & Chile. All items go through rigorous inspections to solidify that our customers receive the best products made from high quality ingredients. OUR COMPANY: Mixed Nuts Inc. Since 1986, Mixed Nuts Inc. has been processing, dry roasting, and packaging a full line of nuts, seeds, and dried fruits in Los Angeles, CA. All domestic raw nuts are brought directly from growers. Our imported products are all brought from the main source in their country of origin. We are a family owned, American made small business. OUR BRAND: Premium Orchard Our Premium Orchard brand has been a vital component to the success of Mixed Nuts Inc. Specifically, we are well known for our dry roasting and flavoring for a variety of mixes. From our best selling pumpkin seeds to our healthy and delicious trail mixes, our products abide by top standards of quality, consistency, and specialty. We are Kosher and HACCP certified. Quality is our primary commitment. We guarantee freshness and proudly represent all our products.
Value: 15.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium Orchard positions this product as a high-quality, health-focused snack with dry-roasted, non-GMO, and gluten-free claims. The brand emphasizes freshness, natural ingredients, and rigorous sourcing, suggesting a mid-to-high price point. Kosher and HACCP certifications further support its premium positioning. The 15 oz size and protein-rich content justify a higher price compared to standard snack options.
